about:
Welcome to my professional space!

I am Ashish Ramrakhiani, a passionate software engineer and a Graduate student at Oregon State University with a stellar academic record. With over four years of industry experience at Colgate Global Business Services, I have a proven track record of designing scalable, high-performance systems that transform complex challenges into seamless solutions. My expertise spans cutting-edge areas such as full stack development, serverless computing, machine learning, and data-driven decision-making, with impactful projects like BugSleuth, an unsupervised bug localization tool, and FLARE, a cloud-agnostic real-time forecasting system. 
My entrepreneurial drive led to co-founding Viva Mind, a mental health tracking platform integrating AI-driven sentiment analysis to enhance user engagement and satisfaction. Whether spearheading innovations that optimize workflows by 70% or crafting user-centric platforms with 5,000+ active users, I am passionate about leveraging technology to drive measurable impact. Let’s connect to explore opportunities where my skills and vision can contribute to building the future of tech at scale.
